subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The meanings of thy fragrant letter became known and evident. Praise be to His Majesty's justice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان معانی نامه مشکین معلوم و واضح گشت ستایش از عدالت اعلیحضرت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @suffering and imprisonment
